item.title: About Me
item.description:
## Mayur Salve

**Penetration Tester · Ethical Hacker · Security Researcher**

I help organizations identify and remediate security vulnerabilities before attackers can exploit them — through manual penetration testing, vulnerability research, and responsible disclosure.

### Core Expertise

- Web Application Penetration Testing

- Network & Infrastructure Security Audits

- Vulnerability Research & Bug Bounty Hunting

- Strong grounding in the OWASP Top 10

- Focus on high-impact, real-world exploitable flaws

item.title: Services
item.description:
## What I Offer

### 🔍 Web Application Penetration Testing

Manual testing of your web application against OWASP Top 10 and business-logic flaws — going beyond automated scanners to find what tools miss.

### 🌐 Network & Infrastructure Audits

Assessment of your internal and external network for misconfigurations, exposed services, and weak access controls.

### 📋 Full VAPT Reports

Detailed Vulnerability Assessment & Penetration Testing reports with severity ratings, proof-of-concept, business impact, and clear remediation steps — written for both technical teams and management.
